Filming for the dystopic future-themed motion picture is scheduled to take place in various parts of North Carolina from May through August, Dahlquist said. While official sources and casting directors declined to comment on the film's plot and cast, websites like www.IMDB.com outline the plot and actors. The storyline captures the fall of North America in the near future after famine, war, drought and fire ravage the land. The continent is to be replaced by Panem, a country divided into 12 districts and a capitol, according to IMDB. The plot progresses as two young representatives from each district are chosen by lottery to participate in the Hunger Games. Participants in the televised games are forced to eliminate their competitors with the rest of the country looking on. The lead character, Katniss, learns that her sister has been chosen in the lottery to engage in the games, so she volunteers to take her sister's place. The story then follows Katniss and her male counterpart, Peeta, as they prepare to face off against individuals who have been training their whole lives, according to the website. I know that they’ve gained a lot more traction since malls have opened up, so it’s harder to get seats now. Best to phone ahead and reserve a table! My faves are the Gnocco Fritto con Salumi, Mozzarelline Fritte, Tagliatelle al Ragu, Spaghetti Cacio e Pepe, 4 Formaggi, Margherita con Bufala, Stracciatella, Pollo al Burro, and their Tiramisu! Whenever I want to feel like a kid again, I go to for the Iced Chocolate Milk, but they have amazing cocktails as well! My go-to’s ar the amaretto sour, negroni, and the aperol spritz! The resulting weighted sum (WS) is then used as final scoring function on arbitrary new input sequences \[[@B10], [@S2]\] \[ \mathrm{score} = \sum_i w_{ij}\cdot s^j(s). \] Here, $w$ are the weights associated with each model and score type whereas is a scores for an individual prediction method. The set of all scoring functions (or short: models) together that should be combined can include any number or kind thereof; i.e., it includes both motif-based as well functional profiles based on Support Vector Machines, Hidden Markov Models etc \[[@B10]\] . The predictive performance typically increases with the size and diversity of this set - so there are efforts ongoing to develop new prediction methods that can be combined using weighted sums (WS). A recent example is [cross-motif support vector machines](https://www.ncbi,nlm_nih\_gov/pmc_/articlesPMC4290685/) which aim at introducing additional flexibility into the modeling of binding sites \[[@B13]\] . ## Methods ======= ### Model Selection #### For a small number M < 7 models and scores there are simple strategies for selecting weights: * using cross-validation with an independent test set to optimize performance on unseen data; or * optimizing AUC (Area Under Curve) while training the model.
